description: IT management requires automated performance reporting from OpManager. Configure the following two scheduled reports: (1) A weekly 'Infrastructure-Availability-Report' — report type Availability, covering all devices, scheduled every Monday at 08:00 AM, delivered by email to it-ops@company.internal; (2) A monthly 'Executive-Performance-Summary' — report type Performance, covering all devices, scheduled on the 1st of each month at 07:00 AM, delivered by email to it-executive@company.internal. Navigate to Reports in OpManager to create and schedule both reports. Credentials: admin/Admin@123 at http://localhost:8060.
